summary: HAR-685 metaobjectCreate/metaobjectUpdate field value validation matrix for scalar, measurement, reference, rating, URL/color/date/time, text max, and list field types.

coveredTypes.name: boolean-coercion
coveredTypes.note: Shopify 2026-04 coerces this scalar value instead of returning INVALID_VALUE.
